description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: An emergency situation is any situation that would require immediate intervention to prevent initiation of Emergency Shutdown, severe peg divergence, or harm to members and users of the Ecosystem.

Pursuant to [A.0.1.2.1 - Facilitators’ Broad Discretionary Capacity](f18229fe-fbc3-4dc8-ad84-4bca2915f6c4), the Facilitators have broad discretion to apply the emergency-situation processes defined in [A.1.

.1 - Emergency Response](20dcf582-8862-48b3-9ca9-c3703871bd14) to urgent situations. Urgent situations are defined as any situation that involves a time-sensitive matter that would need an expedited governance process, where following a standard governance cycle would be too slow, risk a larger problem, or constitute an important missed opportunity.
